title: Addis Housewares 510405 Dustpan and Stiff Brush Set, Metallic Silver, 5cm
features: Hard wearing for the toughest of jobs
Heavy duty stiff nylon bristle fill
Dustpan and brush locks together for storage
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life. Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. Dimensions W21cm X H31.5cm X D11cm. Stiff Bristles The stiff bristles help to sweep all the contents into the pan- not allowing you to miss any areas. Clips into Handle The brush handle clips nicely into the pan to make it easy for storage. Made from a brand that has been part of the home since 1780.
